message:
Add fault injection framework, compat factory E2E tests, and provider backward lock

tests/agent_loop_reliability.rs — Fault injection framework:
- FaultEpisodeRecord and FaultTransition structs for structured
  fault-episode recording with write_fault_episode_artifact helper
- make_timeline_callback factored out of capture_timeline for reuse
- FlakyTimeoutThenSuccessProvider: fails N times then succeeds,
  simulating transient timeout recovery
- StreamContractViolationProvider: for testing stream protocol violations
- tool_result_text helper, fault classification constants
  (FAULT_CLASS_RECOVERABLE, FAULT_CLASS_FATAL)

tests/provider_factory.rs — End-to-end compat factory validation:
- Mock HTTP server infrastructure: MockHttpResponse, SSE body
  generators for OpenAI chat and responses formats
- request_header helper and drive_provider_stream_to_done helper
- schema_compat_overrides_flow_through_factory_for_openai_completions
  test: validates full pipeline from models.json with compat overrides
  through ModelRegistry → create_provider → HTTP request, verifying
  custom headers, max_completion_tokens field, system role name, and
  tool suppression all propagate to wire format

tests/provider_backward_lock.rs (new — bd-3uqg.2.5):
- Behavioral lock test suite snapshotting exact request JSON shapes,
  auth header selection, URL construction, default values, and tool
  conversion formats for all 5 stable providers (Anthropic, OpenAI,
  OpenAI Responses, Cohere, Gemini)
- Prevents refactors from silently changing wire-format behavior

tests/perf_regression.rs — Clippy lint cleanup:
- clippy::similar_names allow, map_or_else, inline format args,
  Process::memory method reference, removed unnecessary clone

tests/suite_classification.toml:
- Added provider_backward_lock to classified test suite

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
